channel.title: 谷德设计网 gooood.cn 最新文章
channel.description: 谷德设计网是中国具有影响力和广泛关注度的建筑、景观、室内与设计门户平台。本 feed 自动抓取最近 100 篇文章的标题、摘要与封面。

item.title: Northview保障性公寓，美国 / Brooks + Scarpa|Northview Apartments by Brooks + Scarpa
item.description: The central social garden

item.title: 蓝房子，葡萄牙 / extrastudio|Blue House by extrastudio
item.description: A home that preserves traces of the past

item.title: 未来社会创新中心，宁波 / 直距建筑设计|Future Social Innovation Center by Displacement Architectural
item.description: Finding Certainty Amid Uncertainty

item.title: Oakley Place住宅改造，伦敦 / RUSSIAN FOR FISH|Oakley Place by RUSSIAN FOR FISH
item.description: Colour and Light Reshape Everyday Family Life

item.title: 798 COFFEE七九八艺术区店，北京 / 借光实践建筑设计工作室| 798 COFFEE (798 Art District Store Design) by Enlightenarch Studio
item.description: A split-level design made of steel structure

item.title: ONE.1 STUDIO，四川成都 / 壹佳一舍|ONE.1 STUDIO by ONE.1 STUDIO
item.description: An Open Hybrid Space for Aesthetic Education within an Old Factory

item.title: 白仓-孤独试验，廊坊 / M.S.A.A.不山建筑|A white barn-A Solitary Experiment by M.S.A.A.atelier
item.description: Wheat, wind, drawing water and shadow.

item.title: 大河村国家考古遗址公园大河村遗址博物馆，郑州 / 中国建筑设计研究院有限公司|Zhengzhou Dahecun National Archaeological Site Park by China Architecture Design and Research Group
